# UC-10.6.199 Â· Citrix Unauthorized Published Application Launch Attempts

## Description

Users should only start applications and desktops they are assigned. Elevated or repeated denials for resources outside entitlement can show probing for exposed icons, policy gaps, or automation testing wrong shortcuts. A burst from one account to many unassigned apps is higher risk than a single typo in self-service.

## Value

Users should only start applications and desktops they are assigned. Elevated or repeated denials for resources outside entitlement can show probing for exposed icons, policy gaps, or automation testing wrong shortcuts. A burst from one account to many unassigned apps is higher risk than a single typo in self-service.

## Implementation

Distinguish user-driven mistakes from service accounts. Join `app_name` to a catalog of all published resources and role assignments. Alert on more than N distinct denied apps per user per day. If storefront exposes sensitive names to the wrong group, also fix catalog visibility, not just logging. For Citrix DaaS, include cloud connectorâ€“visible events in scope.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
â€˘ `index=xd`; `citrix:broker:events` and `citrix:storefront:resource` with `app_name`, `result` or `deny_reason`, `user`, `client_ip`. Optional `entitled_apps` lookup (AD group x app id).

Step 1 â€” Configure data collection
Normalize denial: one `eval denied=` for deny/forbidden/not entitled. Filter LB probes: `search NOT (uri="*health*")` or known probe users. Tag `env=lab` for lower sev. `FIELDALIAS` for `app_name` if `resource_name` is used instead.

Step 2 â€” Create the search and alert
Start `hits>3`/h; raise to 5â€“10 after one week. Second alert: `dc(app_name)`>N/24h where app in `sensitive_apps.csv` (P1). Throttle: user+hour. Optional: `streamstats` first-seen denied app per 30d for probe pattern.

Step 3 â€” Validate
Lab: intentional denied launch increments; entitled success is zero. SAs in allow-list. Check `deny_reason` is populated on StoreFront.

Step 4 â€” Operationalize
SOC: pivot to PAM. Insiders: many distinct denied LOB. Escalation: L2 identity + catalog, L3 if OU-wide icon misconfig. Remediate Store visibility, not just SIEM. Include DaaS connectorâ€“visible events if in cloud.

## SPL

```spl
index=xd (sourcetype="citrix:broker:events" OR sourcetype="citrix:storefront:resource") earliest=-24h
| eval denied=if(match(lower(result),"(?i)deny|unauthorized|forbidden|not.?(allowed|entitled|assigned)") OR match(lower(deny_reason),"(?i)deny|policy|not.?(found|entitled)"),1,0)
| where denied=1
| bin _time span=1h
| stats count as hits, values(app_name) as apps, values(deny_reason) as reason by _time, user, client_ip
| where hits>3
| table _time, user, client_ip, hits, apps, reason
```

## Visualization

Bar chart: denied launches by app; table: top users; sparkline: hits over time for flagged accounts.
